rationale: In the citing paper, Boyd et al. (2019) appears as a single introductory citation supporting a broad claim that mobile apps are part of omnichannel strategy and can build loyalty. The paper does not engage the cited study's specific arguments on app design or firm-value effects in its hypothesis development, empirical design, or interpretation of results. The main theory positioning and estimation strategy are built around other app-adoption and DID literature, so this citation functions as background context.
